title: Senior Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of Baroda! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of Baroda:
Bank of Baroda is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda!
